childhood.familyBackground: Married to the late Robert C. McNair, who founded the Houston Texans NFL team and made his fortune in power generation.
childhood.familyBackgroundKo: 휴스턴 텍산스 NFL 팀을 설립하고 발전 사업으로 재산을 축적한 고 로버트 C. 맥네어와 결혼.
childhood.education: Studied at university in the United States.

careerTimeline.event: Husband Robert McNair was awarded the Houston Texans NFL franchise for $700 million
careerTimeline.eventKo: 남편 로버트 맥네어가 7억 달러에 휴스턴 텍산스 NFL 프랜차이즈 획득

careerTimeline.event: Robert McNair passed away; Janice inherited majority ownership of the Texans
careerTimeline.eventKo: 로버트 맥네어 사망; 재니스가 텍산스 대주주 상속

careerTimeline.event: Houston Texans franchise valued at over $5 billion
careerTimeline.eventKo: 휴스턴 텍산스 프랜차이즈 가치 50억 달러 이상 평가

failures.description: Managing the transition of NFL team ownership after husband's death
failures.descriptionKo: 남편 사망 후 NFL 팀 소유권 전환 관리
failures.lesson: Succession planning and family governance are critical for sports franchise ownership
failures.lessonKo: 스포츠 프랜차이즈 소유에 승계 계획과 가족 거버넌스가 중요

personalTraits.knownFor: Owner of the Houston Texans NFL team, one of the wealthiest women in sports
personalTraits.knownForKo: 휴스턴 텍산스 NFL 팀 소유자, 스포츠계에서 가장 부유한 여성 중 한 명
personalTraits.philanthropy: The McNair family has donated over $700 million to education, healthcare, and community organizations in Houston.
personalTraits.philanthropyKo: 맥네어 가문은 휴스턴의 교육, 의료, 지역사회 단체에 7억 달러 이상 기부.
